content: Across comparison roundups (Time Timer, Visual Countdown Timer, Little Timer Hatch Countdown, Brili), the consistent 'good visual timer' bar is: a genuinely visual shrinking display (wedge/bar/disc) not just digits; calm optional sound with a mutable, non-jarring end chime rather than an alarm; and pairing the timer with a real routine step improves effectiveness over a standalone generic timer. Differentiating apps add chore/routine tracking, reward systems, or narrative end-states (egg hatching into an animal) — these lean toward gamification/routines territory beyond a pure timer.
